name: patchviz

metadata.name: patchviz
metadata.summary: Patch Viz: A library to test how well your model holds up against adversarial attacks

documentation: # Patch Viz

methods.name: patchviz.model_loader.ModelLoader.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the ModelLoader with options for custom weights.

```
param model_name

Name of the model architecture (default: 'resnet18').

param pretrained

Whether to use pretrained weights (default: True).

param num_classes

Number of output classes for the model.

param custom_weights

Path to a user-provided weight file (optional).
```

methods.name: patchviz.model_loader.ModelLoader._load_model
documentation: Load the model architecture and optionally load custom weights.

methods.name: patchviz.model_loader.ModelLoader.predict
documentation:
Perform predictions using the loaded model.

```
param inputs

Input tensor to pass through the model.

return

Model predictions.
```

methods.name: patchviz.adversarial_patch.AdversarialPatch.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the adversarial patch.

```
param patch_size

Tuple indicating the size of the patch as a fraction of image dimensions (width, height).

param image_size

Tuple indicating the dimensions of the input image (width, height).

param num_channels

Number of channels in the image (default: 3 for RGB).
```

methods.name: patchviz.adversarial_patch.AdversarialPatch.place_patch
documentation:
Places a given patch on a batch of images.

Args:
    img: The batch of images.
    patch: The patch tensor to be placed on the images.

Returns:
    img: The batch of images with the patch placed on random locations.

methods.name: patchviz.adversarial_patch.AdversarialPatch.eval_patch
documentation:
Evaluates the performance of a given patch on a validation set.

Args:
    model: The model to be evaluated.
    patch: The patch tensor to be evaluated.
    val_loader: The validation data loader.
    target_class: The target class for evaluation.

Returns:
    tuple: A tuple containing two elements:
        - acc: Accuracy of the model predicting the target class on the validation set.
        - top5: Top-5 accuracy of the model predicting the target class on the validation set.

methods.name: patchviz.adversarial_patch.AdversarialPatch.train_patch
documentation:
Trains a patch to fool a given model into predicting a specific target class.

Args:
    model: The model to be attacked.
    target_class: The target class for the attack.
    patch_size (int): The size of the patch to be trained.
    num_epochs (int): The number of training epochs.

Returns:
    tuple: A tuple containing two elements:
        - patch.data: The trained patch tensor.
        - dict: A dictionary containing the validation results of the trained patch.

methods.name: patchviz.adversarial_patch.AdversarialPatch.get_patches
documentation:
Gets or trains patches for a given list of class names and patch sizes.

Args:
    class_names: A list of class names for which patches are to be retrieved or trained.
    patch_sizes: A list of patch sizes for which patches are to be retrieved or trained.

Returns:
    dict: A dictionary containing the evaluation results of patches.

classes.name: patchviz.examples.IntelCNN
documentation: sys.path.append("../patchit/")

methods.name: patchviz.explainer.Explainer.get_last_conv_layer
documentation:
Find the last convolutional layer in a given model.

```
param model

PyTorch model instance.

return

The last convolutional layer of the model.
```

methods.name: patchviz.explainer.Explainer._unnormalize_image
documentation: Unnormalize an image tensor for visualization.

methods.name: patchviz.explainer.Explainer._plot_saliency
documentation:
Compute and process saliency map for visualization.

```
param input_tensor

The input image tensor (1, C, H, W).

param label

Target class label for the saliency computation.

return

Processed saliency map (H, W).
```

methods.name: patchviz.explainer.Explainer.explain
documentation:
Visualize saliency maps and Grad-CAM for a batch of images.

```
param images

Batch of original images.

param patch_batch

Batch of patched images.

param labels

True labels for the batch.

param n_samples

Number of samples to visualize (default: 5).

param filename

Optional filename to save the visualization.
```

methods.name: patchviz.data_loader.DatasetLoader.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the DatasetLoader.

```
param data_dir

Path to the dataset directory.

param transform

Transformations to apply to the dataset.

param batch_size

Batch size for the DataLoader.

param custom_classes

Custom list of class names in desired order (optional).
```

methods.name: patchviz.data_loader.DatasetLoader.get_sample_batch
documentation:
Get a single batch of data from the DataLoader.

```
return

Tuple (images, labels)
```

methods.name: patchviz.data_loader.DatasetLoader.plot_sample_batch
documentation: Plot a batch of images with their corresponding labels.

methods.name: patchviz.visualizer.Visualizer.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the Visualizer.

```
param idx_to_class

Dictionary mapping indices to class labels.

param adv_patch

Adversarial patch object.

param model

Pre-trained model.

param norm_mean

Normalization mean used during preprocessing.

param norm_std

Normalization std used during preprocessing.
```

methods.name: patchviz.visualizer.Visualizer._unnormalize_image
documentation:
Unnormalize an image tensor.

```
param img

The image tensor (C, H, W).

return

Unnormalized numpy array (H, W, C).
```

methods.name: patchviz.visualizer.Visualizer.show_predictions
documentation:
Visualize original images, patched images, and their predictions.

```
param images

Original image tensors (batch of C, H, W).

param labels

True labels for the images.

param patch

Adversarial patch tensor.

param n_samples

Number of samples to visualize (default: 5).

param top_k

Number of top predictions to display (default: 5).
```
